title: Mental Health Aspect Activities
content: Activities Activity Calendar 2025 Activities Conducted November 2025: A Special Talk on "Practicing Mindfulness to Deal with Exam Anxiety" by Dr. Shalini Dhadwal, Practicing Psychotherapist, and Student Counsellor, JUIT, on Nov 24, 2025. Free Dance Therapy Session for students for relieving stress on Nov 22, 2025. Advisory issued to students for being successful in life on Nov 11, 2025. October 2025: Report on Training Program for Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff on Mental Health Awareness, October 10, 2025 Creating Awareness for Mental Peace- Oct 06, 2025 September 2025: Report - Mental Health Session for Faculty, Saturday 20 Sept, 2025 Report on Dance Therapy - Sept 15, 2025 Suicide Prevention Day, September 10, 2025 Awareness during Rainy Season- September 03, 2025 August 2025: National Sports Day – August 26, 2025 Exam Stress Management – August 25, 2025 Stress Relief Activity – August 11, 2025 July 2025: Yoga celebration July 15-24, 2025
